title: Trade Market for WynnCraft
description: Global player-to-player marketplace. List items for sale, negotiate with buyers via built-in chat, and make trades across servers.
body:
# Trade Market



Trade Market is a mod for creating a global trading market between players. All data is synchronized via the cloud, allowing you to trade with players on different servers.



## Features



- Listing items - Sell any items by specifying the price and terms of the transaction

- Global catalog - View all active offers from other players

- Built-in chat - Negotiate a transaction directly in the mod's interface

- My lots - manage your ads (up to 3 active lots)

- Support system - create tickets when you have problems

- Localization - Localization of the menu from Russian to English and from English to Russian



## How to use



1. Press the F8 key to open the menu

2. Tab "All lots"- view other players' offers

3. Tab "My lots"- manage your ads

4. Tab "Sell" - create a new lot



## Requirements



- Minecraft 1.21.11

- Fabric Loader 0.18.0+

Fabric API

Any questions? Something didn’t work out? Then write directly to the author of the mod on
